commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a6180828bc52acb025fc584f158dc0a96fef7aa5)
commands.review_summary:
Adds Discord `mediaUrls` handling to outbound payload and low-level send helpers so multiple files can be uploaded in one Discord message with overflow splitting, plus focused tests and a small unrelated agent test cleanup.

PR surface: Source +201, Tests +107. Total +308 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.6.10 accept only scalar Discord media inputs in public actions and build a one-file REST upload body. I did not run a live Discord bot round trip in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should request the delivery fixes and contributor-owned live Discord proof; ClawSweeper repair should not queue while the proof gate remains unmet.

target.title: fix(discord): send multiple attachments per message
target.body:
﻿Fixes #24196

## What Problem This Solves
Discord supports up to 10 file attachments per message, but OpenClaw's Discord outbound path split `mediaUrls` into separate Discord sends. That made generated multi-file replies noisier than Discord's native message shape.

## Why This Change Was Made
- Adds `mediaUrls` support to `sendMessageDiscord` and uploads attachments in batches of 10 files per Discord message.
- Routes plain Discord payloads with multiple `mediaUrls` through that multi-attachment path instead of the generic one-media-per-send fallback.
- Preserves existing single-media behavior, reply references, formatting options, components/embeds, media access options, and the video-caption split behavior.

## User Impact
Discord replies with up to 10 generated files now arrive as one message with multiple attachments. Replies with more than 10 files are split into the minimum number of Discord messages.

## Evidence
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/discord/src/send.sends-basic-channel-messages.test.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/discord/src/send.creates-thread.test.ts extensions/discord/src/send.components.test.ts extensions/discord/src/channel.test.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-adapter.interactive-order.test.ts`
- `& .\node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.cmd --check --threads=1 extensions\discord\src\send.shared.ts extensions\discord\src\send.outbound.ts extensions\discord\src\outbound-payload.ts extensions\discord\src\send.sends-basic-channel-messages.test.ts extensions\discord\src\outbound-adapter.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
